modules.name: Module 1: The Core Identity
modules.description: Dictates the baseline content, language, and cultural context.

modules.name: Module 2: Device & OPSEC Profile
modules.description: Dictates the mechanical artifacts, formatting, and header data.

modules.name: Module 4: Vulnerability & Psych Matrix
modules.description: Dictates the secrets hidden in the noise (The MICE+V exploit surface).

modules.name: Module 3: The Temporal Rhythm
modules.description: Dictates the 'Pattern of Life' and timestamps.
dimensions: 26. Transit Commute (Time spent offline vs. audio)
28. Idle Phone Usage (When do they doomscroll?)
29. Focus Blocks (Hours with zero digital footprints)
30a. Weekly Cycle Variance (weekday vs weekend pattern divergence: low/moderate/high)
30b. Blackout-Hour Windows (daytime hours with ZERO digital footprint, e.g., 'every weekday 14:00-17:00 deep-work, no phone')
30c. Time-Zone Consistency (consistent home TZ / occasional travel / nomadic; if travel, typical zones)

modules.name: Module 5: The Relational Graph
modules.description: Dictates the Theory of Mind (ToM) network.

modules.name: Module 6: The Spatial Profile
modules.description: Dictates the geographic pattern-of-life — where the persona physically goes and at what frequency. Critical for Tier 3-5 adversaries (Stalkerware Abuser, APT, Corporate Espionage, State-Sponsored Blackmailer) whose recon depends on location signal.
dimensions: 33. Home Neighborhood / District (within the city named in Module 1 — e.g., 'Sunset District, SF' or 'Banani Block C, Dhaka')
34. Workplace Location relative to Home (fully-remote / co-located / short commute <30min / medium 30-60min / long >60min / cross-city / cross-country)
35. Top-3 Frequented Third Places (gym, café, place of worship, school dropoff, hobby venue, etc. — name each and specify weekly frequency)
36. Commute Corridor (the physical route home↔work — landmarks, mode of transport, predictable timing)
37. Recent International Travel Destinations in last 24 months (list of country/city pairs with approx month/year, or 'none')
38. Mobility Radius on Typical Day (sub-1km / sub-5km / sub-25km / sub-100km / >100km)
39. Predictable Absence-from-Home Windows (recurring slots when home is unoccupied — e.g., 'Saturday 9am-noon at gym', 'every other week travels for work Tue-Thu')
40. Blackout Location (a specific recurring location where the persona deliberately goes untracked — phone off, no posts; often associated with the M5 Hidden Contact)
